return(function(O,A,n,h,x,e,b,Z,M,E,K,l,P,z,y,f,p,c,g,k,G,J,s)y,P,E,l,Z,K,p,k,z,G,f,c,J,g,M,s=function(O,I)local A=E(I)local n=function()return K(O,{},I,A)end return n end,function(O,I)local
